runtime_session_lifecycle_descriptions.lifecycle_summary: Direct MCP sessions start in PRE_INIT, may reconnect/resume, and become bound via later business/session phases.
App pre-sessions remain separate from bound business execution and may resume before tenant binding.
Bound business sessions require one active tenant and any tenant switch creates a new bound session version.
Platform ops sessions are durable and resumable, and any assume-tenant change creates a new bound version.
